1828670.name: Alder Forge Soundtrack
1828670.description:
The Alder Forge Soundtrack includes all the in-game music, from exploration and battles to menus and cinematic, the full score is dominated by a full orchestral partition, especially the powerful string section it includes, brass, keys, and percussion, all given the nuance and artistic curve by a triple-layered Choir and a Soprano.

The Alder Forge Main Game Early Access Transitions


This Soundtrack will be updated with additional tracks each time the Alder Forge Main Game transitions from one chapter to another.

Planned Discs:
  • Disc 1 (Release: January 7th, 2022)
  • Disc 2 (Release: August 19th, 2022)
  • Disc 3 (Release: February 3rd, 2023)
  • Disc 4 (Release: August 4th, 2023)
